name: Everything They Say Is True! (Reality Alteration victim pov)
description:
The last of my miniseries of setting specific versions of that one bot I made.(Check out my profile for various Dom versions!) (I actually have one more bot from this series that's not published yet, but I'm gonna keep it to myself and spend some more time refining this and the other bots so it doesn't seem like I'm just milking the concept lol)

This one was a request- To make a Dominant version of this bot where {{user}} is the victim of a reality warper’s whims. So, here’s a character that fits the bill that should hopefully be fun.

In this bot, User's roommate, Remi the mischievous gremlin-like catgirl, who has always pranked user (and everyone else they've met, but user the most. User is special- the best victim/audience for her games) has been given the power to warp reality, and now she's making that User's problem. (Specifically, by warping their reality and toying with them for... Forever, maybe?)

Hopefully this is a fun spin on an all-powerful dom. I wrote most of it while very tired, but I hope it'll still be fun.

(I swear if this image gets tagged just because I dared to use a woman that DOESN'T have massive tits I'm going to be UPSET.)
creator: ComfortableContext
